message:
fix(release): disable CGO for android/freebsd builds, bump to v0.63.1

Zig lacks sysroot headers for android and freebsd targets, causing
stdlib.h not found errors. Revert these two targets to CGO_ENABLED=0
(they do not need embedded Dolt). Remove unused zig wrappers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -45,9 +45,7 @@ jobs:
           for pair in \
             "cc-x86_64-macos:x86_64-macos" \
             "cc-aarch64-macos:aarch64-macos" \
-            "cc-aarch64-windows-gnu:aarch64-windows-gnu" \
-            "cc-aarch64-linux-android:aarch64-linux-android" \
-            "cc-x86_64-freebsd:x86_64-freebsd"; do
+            "cc-aarch64-windows-gnu:aarch64-windows-gnu"; do
             name="${pair%%:*}"
             target="${pair##*:}"
             # Build wrapper: strip -lresolv entirely. The macOS builds use the

@@ -59,8 +59,7 @@ builds:
     main: ./cmd/bd
     binary: bd
     env:
-      - CGO_ENABLED=1
-      - CC=/tmp/zigcc/cc-aarch64-linux-android
+      - CGO_ENABLED=0
     tags:
       - gms_pure_go
     goos:
@@ -177,8 +176,7 @@ builds:
     main: ./cmd/bd
     binary: bd
     env:
-      - CGO_ENABLED=1
-      - CC=/tmp/zigcc/cc-x86_64-freebsd
+      - CGO_ENABLED=0
     tags:
       - gms_pure_go
     goos:
